examples.title: Algorithm: Android Activity Lifecycle
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AndroidActivityLifecycle
INPUT: activity
OUTPUT: none

BEGIN
 onCreate()
 onStart()
 onResume()
 onPause()
 onStop()
 onDestroy()
END
examples.explanation: The Android activity lifecycle consists of several stages, including creation, start, resume, pause, stop, and destruction.
